query:
-- Criar novo corretor de teste
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, role, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('test-corretor-123', 'Corretor Teste Follow-up', 'corretor.teste.followup@example.com', 'corretor', NOW(), NOW());

-- Pegar o ID do novo corretor
SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE email = 'corretor.teste.followup@example.com';

-- Atualizar follow-up do Marcio Lira para o novo corretor
UPDATE follow_ups 
SET corretorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'corretor.teste.followup@example.com' LIMIT 1)
WHERE leadId = 4572;

-- Atualizar lead Marcio Lira para o novo corretor
UPDATE leads
SET corretorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'corretor.teste.followup@example.com' LIMIT 1)
WHERE id = 4572;

-- Verificar
SELECT 
  u.id as corretorId,
  u.name as corretor,
  l.nome as lead,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data,
  CURDATE() as hoje
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
INNER JOIN users u ON f.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'corretor.teste.followup@example.com';
